name: Nexaweb Announces Enterprise Web 2.0 Starter Kit for Building Mission-Critical Composite and Mashup Ajax Applications
description: Nexaweb press release at AJAX World Conference New York (2007-03-19) unveiling a $17,500 Enterprise Web 2.0 Starter Kit combining the Nexaweb EW2.0 platform, Eclipse-based IDE, and unlimited deployment option using Apache XAP. Peter S. Kastner (VP and research director, IT, Aberdeen Group) endorses the incremental/inexpensive adoption approach and recommends proper planning, starting small, and investing in developer tools.
